scale_source: wall_thickness_pts=5.4 mapped to 0.19 m via PT_TO_M=0.0352 (anchor calibrated 2026-04, see CLAUDE.md §10 'PDF -> m precisa de ancora fisica' memory rule)

rooms.label: SALA DE ESTAR
rooms.source: manual review of planta_74.pdf cross-checked with detected polygon (10.75 m^2)
notes: Most stable room in the plant. Carries the porta-vidro to TERRACO SOCIAL.
Calibrated baseline 2026-05-06 at 10.75 m^2. Range 8-18 absorbs detector noise.

rooms.label: SALA DE JANTAR
notes: Adjacent to SALA DE ESTAR (open social area) and to COZINHA (passage).

rooms.label: COZINHA
notes: Detected at 11.34 m^2 today.
Architecturally adjacent to A.S. (service connection); this adjacency is currently MISSED by the room-context classifier (Cycle 6 follow-up).

rooms.label: LAVABO
notes: Guest bathroom in the social area. Detected at 3.40 m^2.

rooms.label: A.S.
notes: Service area (area de servico). Detected at 10.39 m^2.
Range upper-bound is generous because detector currently bleeds A.S. into nearby exterior strip on the LEFT side (mirror of the FP-012 SUITE 01 issue, smaller magnitude).

rooms.label: TERRACO SOCIAL
notes: Social terrace; non-walled exterior, watershed-clipped via convex hull today. Detected at 13.64 m^2.

rooms.label: TERRACO TECNICO
notes: Technical terrace (clothesline / AC condenser). Detected at 5.77 m^2.

rooms.label: SUITE 01
notes: KNOWN BUG: convex-hull clip leaks watershed; default observed area is 69.91 m^2 (~5x too big), see FP-012 + docs/diagnostics/2026-05-07_planta_74_suite01_polygon_leakage.md.
feature/concave-hull-room-clip-spike (default-off) brings this to 18-26 m^2, which is in range.
v1 GT INTENTIONALLY hard-fails this room until Cycle 8b promotes the concave hull as default. That failure IS the value of the gate — it makes the regression visible.

rooms.label: SUITE 02
notes: Detected at 32.03 m^2 today (slightly oversized via the same FP-012 mechanism as SUITE 01, smaller magnitude).
Range upper-bound 22 INTENTIONALLY hard-fails until Cycle 8b lands.

rooms.label: BANHO 01
notes: Master bath of SUITE 01. Detected at 5.48 m^2.

rooms.label: BANHO 02
notes: Master bath of SUITE 02. Detected at 6.24 m^2.
Open passage between the two sala rooms; may not have a discrete opening object in the consensus.
Service door cozinha to A.S. — currently MISSING from the detected openings (Cycle 6 follow-up).
Ground Truth v1 — 2026-05-07. The 'minimum that already blocks real regression' per the GT design prompt.

Authored by Claude after a multi-pipeline-output audit; cross-checked with the rendered top-down preview (docs/diagnostics/2026-05-07_planta_74_suite01_polygon_leakage.png) and architectural priors for a 74 m^2 Brazilian apartment with 2 suites + 1 lavabo.

The two SUITES are intentionally calibrated to FAIL today against the convex-hull baseline. Cycle 8b (promote concave hull) flips them to PASS. That regression-and-recovery cycle is the v1 value proposition.
v1 deliberately omits: per-wall geometry, per-room polygon IoU, opening positions along walls, mobiliario, materials. Those are v2 once the v1 metrics stabilize.
Update procedure: bump schema_version on breaking changes; expand a range only with a PR that explains why the detector moved.
